inputs.prompt: Title: The Waiting Room. Format: Feature documentary, 90 min. Subject: A documentary set entirely inside a visa processing centre, following applicants from five different countries over three months as they wait for decisions that will change their lives. Each person's story reveals a different face of immigration policy. Target: Festival circuit. Stage: In production.
Title: Backyard. Format: Podcast series. Subject: Urban gardening movement. Audience: general.

Title: The Interpreters. Format: Documentary series, 4 x 52 min. Subject: Court interpreters across the EU who translate the most emotionally charged testimony in asylum hearings, war crimes tribunals, and domestic violence cases. What they carry home. Target: European public broadcasters. Stage: Development.
